transcript.text:
It's coming out!
[10kg of King Crabs & Lobsters]
[One after the other]
[What's that noise?]
[Ramyun noodles with its guts]
[Singing a ramyun song]
[10kg of King Crabs and Lobsters starting now!]
Hello everyone
It's been a while since I've done a live stream
I prepared the things that I've been craving
One 4kg King Crab, and two 3kg Lobsters
Total of 10kg!
I bought them from Noryangjin Fisheries Wholesale Market
Let's get started It won't be as good cold
Lobster first because there are 2
Claw!

It's this big
They gave me these cut
Amazing...
There are 2 sauces
Buldak Mayo (Fire Chicken), and Cheese sauces
Bon appetit
Plain
Chewy and tasty
With some sauce
That goes so well together
Amazing... Now with some cheese
They go so well together
Can you hear the sound?
Slipped right out
You can buy them either raw or cooked
Steaming them at home is so much better

Save money
King crab
Let's get 1 leg
The biggest one
That's no joke
[The visuals are no joke either]
It's coming out
It's sweet
[Viewer: Be careful not to hurt your hand] I will don't worry
I'm very experienced Not my first time
It didn't come out
I'm very experienced Not my first time
Cheese sauce
It went in the wrong sauce
Let's try the tail
Ta-da

Steaming
The tail is this big
It's nice and hot right now I'll take a bite
[Yes... This is it]
Cheese sauce
Now with the buldak mayo
This goes well with it too
[The tail is gone already]
I have to use the guts
I'll cut them up now
Flip this guy over
I'm sorry
Yellow guts
[So hard to crack open because of its size]
This is my favorite part of the king crab
There's meat if you open this up

Guts
Meat with guts
The guts are stuck here Must eat everything
Not too elegant, but...
[Can't resist good food...]
So good
Guys... I want some ramyun noodles after too
Cheese sauce goes so well
Have you had king crab with cheese?
I've never seen or done it before But it's really good
The guts
Not too much in here
[Nom nom]
[Viewer: Make fried rice with the guts] Should I cook noodles or fried rice?
Choose for me
[Viewer: Ramyun, of course]

Noodles with guts taste amazing
How is still so good?
Cut it in half just like this
Can you see the guts?
Cut the little legs like this
I'll be eating them
Should I open this one up?
I should've eaten this one earlier
Look at its guts
Am I dumb?
[Where did she go...?]
[She was smashing it with the scissors]
[What are you doing...?]
It's not working
This is another way to do it
It's out

[Scoop the guts out]
That's so good
Eating this part of the meat is not good It gets pretty messy
I will be eating this later off-camera
[But check out the tail meat on that lobster!]
[You can hear the texture of the meat]
Guts
Cover your ears
[We lowered the volume for you...]
[Break it up!]
I should've prepared a hammer I'm sorry
I don't have one
I digested everything already
I'm hungry
Can I go outside to break this?
[Giving it all she got]

[Not an earthquake... Just a mukbang]
It won't work Let's take this out
[Touched...]
[Viewer: King crab meat on your hair] It's okay, I'll eat that later
[Viewer: On top of your head!]
[Takes long to take out, but disappears quickly]
I'll give you a tip
The prices range widely at Noryangjin market
Not too common nowadays, but If you want to spend less,
You can use the 2 phone apps for the market
You can sort them by price on there
I use that before I buy
There are a lot of places that charge 110,000~120,000 Won per kg for King Crabs ($92~$100 USD)
That's so expensive It used to be under 80,000 Won per kg
I used the app this time and got them for 95,000 Won per kg
I highly recommend the app

Put all the meat inside
Should I try this by itself?
Unbelievable
Mix it up?
Put the guts in here
This is too big
[Liar...]
Incredible
Should I put this inside the noodles?
I'll just cook 2 packs
[Ramyun noodles]
With crab meat
[Viewer: Aren't you full?] My stomach is growling a little bit right now
My stomach hurts a little bit whenever I eat King Crabs
[Viewer: Maybe King Crabs aren't for you] I think seafood in general for me
My stomach goes...

Boil boil...
[Singing a ramyun song]
With some chili oil
[Fish sauce]
[Chili powder]
[More chili powder...?]
It's good...
But it's too salty
[Emergency Treatment]
[Why're you putting that in...?]
So good
On the crab shell with guts
[Get some noodles in there!]
Nicely cooked
[Using the shell as a bowl...]
It's not enough

Me eating 2 packs of noodles if like you guys eating 1/3 of a pack
Right, kimchi!
[Can't forget about the kimchi]
Wrap it with kimchi
[Noodle slurp]
[Viewer: Are you finished now?] I stopped because my stomach hurts
It hurts!
Did you hear that? Did you guys hear it?
My stomach just growled
I'm in pain
Let's clean this up first
[Getting better with Jingu]
Ear massage
[A happy cat owner's life]
[Bringing more food...?]
[Ice cream with a stomach ache?]

[Eating comes first...]
This is... "Wa"
[After eating 2 ice creams...]
I will end it here
Thanks everyone!
Bye bye!
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
